title: Sanctioned/Controlled Entity Schema
description: Common normalized record for entities (companies, organizations, individuals, vessels, aircraft) appearing on a country's export control or sanction list.

country.description: ISO-3166-like two-letter country/region code of the issuing authority (e.g. 'us', 'jp', 'cn')

list_id.description: References the 'id' field of the source datasource in countries/<cc>/datasources.yaml

source_list_name.description: Name of the specific sub-list this record came from, if the datasource aggregates multiple lists (e.g. 'Entity List (EL) - Bureau of Industry and Security')

entity_name.description: Primary listed name of the entity or individual

addresses.description: Known addresses of the listed party

reason.description: Program(s) or stated reason for listing

date_added.description: Date the entity was added to the list, if known, in YYYY-MM-DD format

source_url.description: URL to the specific entry or the official source page

last_verified.description: Date this record was last confirmed against the primary source, in YYYY-MM-DD format
